stemHtml: The Point of Equal Time PET is the point along a planned route from the departure A to the destination B where, under certain conditions, it…

options.a: is not possible to return to A without using reserves.
options.b: must return to A in the event of an emergency.
options.c: is the last chance to return to A.
options.d: takes equal time to proceed to B or to return to A.
